name: ISHI BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (STONE REPLICATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Doton)

Rank: 6 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 10

Learn DC: 20 | Successes: 5

Perform: 8 | Perform DC: 21

Components: C, E, F, H, Mas

This forbidden creates a single earth clone made from earth and rock, appearing from a material source range.

Appearance: An earth clone weighs six times as much as you (including equipment).

Control: Earth clones cannot swim (nor can they drown). If there is a direct path of solid earth between you, the clone can communicate its experiences with you by thought as well, though it still cannot form sentient thoughts by itself (for example, if you are both touching the floor or walls within the same cave).

Statistics: An earth clone applies the following:

- Its maximum HP equals your character level
- It has hardness 4
- It has earth resistance 15

Earth clones count as one size larger when grappling or using or defending against bull rush, disarm and trip attempts.

Earth clones suffer a -2 penalty to attack rolls and skill checks when moved further than 100 feet from the source of earth that created them.

Equipment: Earth clone equipment has hardness 3 and half of its normal hit points.

Combat: Earth clones can make up to three attacks with a Full Attack, and can use techniques you know, up to Rank 4. Any clones it would create are considered created by you, with the same limits.

Mastery: The fifth step improves the clone's hardness to 6, and lets the clone count as an additional size larger when grappling or using or defending against bull rush, disarm and trip attempts.

In addition, the clone gains a slam attack dealing lethal damage as though one size larger than it is (if you are a Medium humanoid, it deals 1d4 base damage).
